description:
Create a single typed MDI HTTP client for all MDI API calls.

**Scope**
- Centralize base URL, auth header injection, timeout/retry behavior, 401 refresh, 418 maintenance handling, error mapping, and request logging redaction.
- Keep all MDI calls behind `src/lib/mdi/client.ts` and small domain helpers.
- Add tests using sanitized fixtures from T-052.

**Acceptance**
- No production code calls MDI with ad hoc `fetch` outside the client/helper layer.
- MDI errors are mapped to patient-safe or ops-safe outcomes.
- Logs contain opaque IDs/status only, not questionnaire answers or clinical details.
title: MDI HTTP client single entrypoint
